urls.title: Your First Football AI Agent
urls.description: Build your own AI coaching assistant. No code. No tech skills. Just your expertise. 7 lessons + 5 bonus lessons. $10 until 26 April (normally $24).

text:
Training tomorrow. No session planned. Sound familiar? 

I built a course showing you how to build your own AI Assistant to help.

12 lessons. No coding or tech knowledge required. 
 
Now $10 (normally $24).
